channel.title: The NORD Notes
channel.description: Recent content on The NORD Notes

item.title: The Solid Software Bookshelf
item.description: One upon a time I worked at a web agency in Amsterdam. It was great times. We were talented and hungry, had lunch together every day, and the Grolsch was free and always fully stocked. Something in particular I loved was our library of books, spanning everything from operating system design to Zen buddhism. Management books explained TPM and The Toyota Way; personal productivity books taught GTD and The 7 Habits; and philosophy books provided different perspectives on everything.
